title: Iris — RALIA AI character
summary: Iris is RALIA's AI persona: lettermark, voice, conversation chrome and the teal signature treatment. The persona is RALIA-private; the generic AI-surface primitives beneath it (IrisThinking, StreamingText, CitationChip, PromptChip) are consumable Layer 2 and re-bindable per product via the iris.* semantic chain.
buildInstead: Consume the iris.* semantic tokens and the ai/ domain primitives; re-bind iris.* per product rather than copying the Iris persona (v4.3 §1.2). Small lettermark glyphs must use iris.accent-on-dark (scanner rule R11).
